text.text:
Drink: supreme brown sugar boba milk tea (5/5)
- i dont usually go for brown sugar milk tea because they always disappoint but heytea’s was actually good.
- brown sugar at the bottom with the boba was warm and it perfectly complemented the milk tea base.
- the milk tea itself i believe was a jasmine tea base.
- for the price, and what you’d find for that same price at other stores, this drink is very delectable.

Atmosphere (3.5/5)
- nothing crazy, some seating but id imagine it gets worse when busier
- the vibe feels very “wanna be clean” if that makes sense and although the kitchen is, the seating areas aren’t on par.
- didn’t affect my rating since i don’t go to boba shops to linger around awhile.

Service: (4.5/5)
- good service and got my drink pretty quick.
- what you would expect nothing crazy and not much to say here

Overall rating: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
The drink itself and how fast it came out when i was there carried the rating and id go back again.

text.text:
A friend recommended this place, & I came to try many times.  I think these 4 are the ok drinks here: the supreme bobo milk tea (for 1st time, after that it becomes boring, too creamy & to sweet), the cold  jasmine milk tea (very strong), coconut mango boom ( which my son likes), & recently the pistachio cloud king jasmine (light/less sugar adjustment).
I like the way they provide the paper bag, it looks fancy. The shop is small & clean.

Downside: take really long time to get the drink, all their milk teas taste the same flavour as the supreme bobo milk tea. Nothing different when adding bobo into the drink.  I guess they using too much brown sugar, that’s why it becomes too sweet when adding bobo into the drink.
I don’t recommend to add bobo into the black milk tea with less sugar. It tastes sooo sweet.  I bought my drink at 13:25 & just drink 2 sips to taste, & the drink still full at 10:41pm.  This is the first time I’ve ever been able to drink a milk teas.
Second one is the triple supreme matcha latte, it tastes bitter & blind, we had to throw it away.

text.text:
5/11/2026*
When I ordered online, the estimated wait time was 10 min, but I ended up waiting another 40 min in the store, and my drink still wasn't ready. I finally checked in with the staff, and that's when they realized they had never started making my drinks. This is actually my second time experiencing this issue. On a separate occasion, I also asked a staff member for a bag, and she just placed it on the counter and threw the straws onto the counter as well.

4/27/2026
I went there to get my usual order, the Triple Supreme Matcha, and everything tasted perfect with great matcha flavors!

9/24/25
I feel that Heytea's quality is really consistent, even though its price are a bit higher than other boba shops.

This time I tried their Coconut Matcha Bbo, which has cloud, macha, coconut milk and boba. It tasted great, the flavor was on point. I ordered on their app, which makes it easy to customize your drink. Highly recommended!

text.text: Ordered at 7:52 and received my drinks at 8:52. Exactly one hour wait for two drinks. The guy next to me ordered one drink and was waiting at least a half hour. Drinks are good, I went here cause I’ve been to the sf location but they were clean and quick there. Here, not really. I worked in restaurants so I tried to be understanding but come on.

text.text:
I got a Crisp Grape Boom and a Coconut Mango Boom.

The Crisp Grape Boom was very watery and not slushy at all which is weird because this drink is supposed to be a slush. That was the 1st issue with the drink, and the 2nd issue was that the drink was not even filled up to the top of the cup. That is frustrating since I was excited and looking forward to the drinks.
